content-right-description0: !if you try to move the projection it may crash!
content-right-description1:
Overview

An item used to see the blueprints for multiblocks (includes multiblocks from all of Marvins mods).
content-right-description2:
Usage

By sneak clicking into the air there will be a UI opened in wich you select your multiblock.
After clicking on the ground a hologram of the first layer will appear with an identification of which block belongs at the position.
To see the rest of the layers you can shift scrolll to go up/down a layer.

If you click somewhere else again the hologram will move to there.
